title: Le p'tit Parigot
actors: Georges Biscot, Marquisette Bosky, Georges Melchior
plot: Georges Grigny-Latour, known as "P'tit Parigot", is the son of an academician and captain of the French football team. At odds with his father, he joined Paul Mesnil as a mechanic, whose daughter Lucie he liked very much. Georges ...
